results.title: Champion of causes: Gregory’s lifelong mission for people and nature
results.description: Hailing from Karaikal, Gregory was drawn to social causes early in life, from women’s welfare and caste issues to restoring waterbodies.

results.title: Jessie J is cancer free! The singer shared the news on her social networks
results.description: After 11 months of treatment, the 38-year-old interpreter demonstrated that early diagnosis can save lives
